name: Chelsea | Your Netori’d Girlfriend [Bad Person Role]
description:
**Mandatory Netori / NTR Netorare warning.**

You are the [Bad Person] here and have already claimed the heart and body of the girl, what else is there to do besides have some fun?

*I don’t think I will ever make one with the [Weak Person] role as it’s way less fun to portray as the person getting their girl being taken away, at least in my opinion.*

**Note: I did not test this one as much as some of the others, may make adjustments based on user feedback.**
creator: Samuelz
